case_title: MICHELLE HSU VS. HANG C. CONSTRUCTION, INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-10-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-10-2020 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF MICHELLE HSU IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HAUNG C. CONSTRUCTION, INC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY CHING LAM ASSITED BY NON- CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER ALVIN LAM. ALVIN LAM WAS GIVING THE INTERPRETER'S OATH BY COURTROOM CLERK R.SAHATJIAN. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $3,108.62 RE 36286 FOR TRANSACTION W0520204D003 (DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT), PAYABLE TO MICHELLE HSU, DOC#1910503303, WARRANT #38206297, DATED MAY-11-2020
TRIAL RESET TO JAN-10-2020 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF DEC-18-2019 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-10-2020 - JUDGMENT.
JUDGMENT CREDITOR'S REQUEST FOR FUNDS COPIED TO ACCOUNTING
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY HSU, MICHELLE AS TO DEFENDANT HANG C. CONSTRUCTION, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-18-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION RE: RESET OF TRIAL DATE FOR NON-SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF HSU, MICHELLE
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT HANG C. CONSTRUCTION, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HSU, MICHELLE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HANG C. CONSTRUCTION, INC. $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,090.00, COURT FINDS PLAINTIFF IS ENTITLED TO A REFUND OF $3000 FOR PAINTING CAULKING CHARGE BECAUSE WORK WAS INADEQUATE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-01-2020 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00) SERVED DEC-13-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HANG C. CONSTRUCTION, INC.
DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR BY DEFENDANT HANG C. CONSTRUCTION, INC.
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF FILED BY DEFENDANT HANG C. CONSTRUCTION, INC.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT HANG C. CONSTRUCTION, INC.
